title: Successful admin login with valid credentials
description: Verify that an admin user can log in successfully with correct username and password within rate limits, and is redirected to the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter valid admin credentials
Submit the login form
Verify login success and redirection to admin dashboard
Verify session is created and active

title: Login fails on invalid credentials
description: Check that login attempt with incorrect username or password is rejected, shows appropriate error, and does not create a session.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter invalid username or password
Submit the login form
Verify error message is displayed
Verify no session is created

title: Rate limit login attempts at 5 per minute
description: Ensure the login API limits login attempts to 5 per minute per user/IP and blocks further attempts temporarily with an appropriate error message.

steps.description: Perform 5 consecutive failed login attempts rapidly with invalid credentials
Verify all 5 attempts are rejected with invalid login error
Attempt 6th login within one minute
Verify login is blocked with rate limit exceeded error
Verify no session is created

title: Role-based access control: admin access
description: Verify that an authenticated admin user has full access to admin features and pages, including academic program, class, subject, lesson, and room management interfaces.

steps.description: Login as an admin user
Navigate to Academic Program Management
Verify access granted and management UI is shown
Navigate to Lesson Management
Verify full editing and creation rights are allowed

title: Role-based access control: teacher restricted access
description: Verify that an authenticated teacher can only access their dashboard and lesson schedules but cannot access admin management pages or CRUD operations.

steps.description: Login as a teacher user
Attempt to access admin academic program management page
Verify access is denied or redirected
Access teacher dashboard
Verify teacher timetable and schedule are displayed

title: Create academic program with valid data
description: Test admin ability to create a new academic program with valid name, type, and associated grade levels.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to Academic Program Management create page
Fill in valid academic program details including program type and grade levels
Submit the form
Verify academic program is created and appears in list

title: Prevent duplicate academic program names
description: Verify that the system does not allow creating or updating an academic program with a name that already exists in the system.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to Academic Program create page
Enter a program name that already exists
Submit the form
Verify validation error for duplicate name occurs

title: Create school class linked with academic program and grade level
description: Check the ability to create a new school class associating it with a valid academic program and grade level, including active status toggle.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to School Class Management create page
Fill in class details including selecting valid academic program and grade level
Submit the form
Verify class is created and is active by default

title: Filter school classes by academic program and grade level
description: Verify the filtering functionality within school class management lists that filters classes based on selected academic program and grade level combination.

steps.description: Login as admin
Open School Classes list page
Select a specific academic program from filter
Select a grade level within that program from filter
Verify school classes list updates to show only matching classes

title: Create subject with valid types and scheduling modes
description: Test admin's ability to add a subject with specified subject type (Minor/Major), scheduling mode (Lab/Lecture/Flexible), credits, and assign valid teachers.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to Subject Management create page
Fill in subject details with various valid subject types and scheduling modes
Assign qualified teachers to the subject
Submit the form
Verify subject is created with correct attributes and teacher assignments

title: Prevent assigning unqualified teacher to a subject
description: Ensure validation errors occur when trying to assign a teacher to a subject they are not qualified to teach.

steps.description: Login as admin
Open Subject Management subject assign-teacher interface
Attempt to assign a teacher not linked or qualified for the selected subject
Submit the changes
Verify validation error indicating teacher qualification issue

title: Create room with valid attributes and equipment flags
description: Verify admin can create rooms with designation as regular or laboratory room, specify capacity, equipment flags, and that QR code is generated.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to Room Management create page
Fill in room name, select room type (lab or regular), enter capacity, and set equipment flags
Submit the form
Verify room is created and QR code is available

title: Schedule a lesson with valid inputs and conflict validation
description: Test creation of a lesson with class, subject, teacher, room, weekday, and times that pass all validations including no scheduling conflicts, teacher and room availability, and within school hours.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to Lesson Scheduling create page
Provide valid class, subject, teacher assigned to subject, room suitable for subject, and weekday
Specify start and end time within school hours (7 AM - 9 PM), with end time after start
Submit the schedule
Verify lesson is created and appears in timetable

title: Prevent scheduling lessons outside school hours
description: Ensure that the system rejects lesson scheduling attempts with start or end times outside the allowed school hours of 7 AM to 9 PM.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to Lesson Scheduling create page
Set lesson start or end time before 7 AM or after 9 PM
Submit the schedule
Verify validation error related to school hours

title: Detect and prevent double booking of teacher
description: Verify the system prevents scheduling a teacher for overlapping lessons at the same time or in conflicting rooms/days.

steps.description: Schedule a lesson for a teacher at a given time
Attempt to schedule another lesson for the same teacher with overlapping times
Verify conflict detected error and scheduling prevented

title: Detect and prevent double booking of room
description: Ensure the system disallows scheduling two lessons in the same room with overlapping times/days.

steps.description: Schedule a lesson in a room at a given time
Attempt to schedule another lesson in the same room with overlapping time
Verify conflict error prevents scheduling

title: Validate teacher is assigned to subject before scheduling lesson
description: Check that lessons cannot be scheduled with a teacher who is not assigned to teach the lesson's subject.

steps.description: Attempt to schedule a lesson with a teacher not assigned to the lesson's subject
Verify validation error that teacher-subject assignment missing

title: Inline edit lesson details with auto-validation
description: Test inline editing capability for lessons directly in timetable grid or list, including validation checks for conflicts and constraints before saving.

steps.description: Login as admin
Open lesson list or timetable inline editor
Modify lesson time or room to valid values
Save changes
Verify changes saved successfully without conflicts
Modify lesson time to conflict with another lesson
Attempt to save changes
Verify conflict validation error prevents save

title: Master timetable displays all scheduled lessons with conflict highlights
description: Verify the master timetable shows a matrix of rooms versus time slots with all lessons scheduled, highlights conflicts, and shows room utilization stats.

steps.description: Login as admin
Open master timetable view
Verify all lessons appear under correct rooms and time slots
Verify conflicting lessons are visually highlighted
Verify room utilization statistics are displayed per room

title: Room timetable view displays individual room schedules and QR code
description: Test that the room timetable page displays schedule for selected room with option to view or generate QR code for public sharing.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to room timetable management
Select a specific room
Verify room's scheduled lessons are displayed for correct dates and times
Request QR code generation for room timetable
Verify QR code is generated and displayed

title: Public access to room timetable via QR code without login
description: Ensure public users can access a room's timetable by scanning or visiting the QR code URL without any authentication.

steps.description: Obtain public QR code URL for a room timetable
Visit the QR code URL as an unauthenticated user
Verify timetable for the room is displayed correctly
Verify no login or authentication is required

title: Hours tracking reflects lecture and lab hours accurately
description: Verify that the system tracks total scheduled lecture and lab hours per subject-class combination, calculates remaining hours, and displays progress correctly.

steps.description: Login as admin
Schedule lessons for a subject-class with lecture and lab modes
Navigate to hours tracking UI
Verify total hours scheduled, remaining hours, and percent progress reflect accurately

title: Validation API checks for teacher availability conflicts
description: Test the validation API correctly identifies teacher conflicts when scheduling lessons and returns appropriate error messages.

steps.description: Send validation API request with lesson data including teacher and time overlapping an existing booking
Verify response indicates conflict for teacher availability
Send validation API request with no conflicts
Verify response confirms no conflicts

title: Validation API checks for room availability conflicts
description: Test the validation API correctly detects room scheduling conflicts and prevents double booking with proper error responses.

steps.description: Send validation API request with room and lesson time overlapping an existing booking
Verify room availability conflict reported
Send validation API request for available room and timeslot
Verify no conflict response

title: Filtering and pagination persistence in lesson management UI
description: Ensure search filters, sorting, and pagination states persist during navigation and session and do not reset unexpectedly.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to lesson management page
Apply search filters and navigate to page 2 of results
Navigate away and return to lesson management
Verify previously applied filters and pagination page persist

title: CSRF protection enforced on all form submissions
description: Verify all POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE requests include CSRF tokens and submissions without valid tokens are rejected with an error.

steps.description: Attempt to submit form (e.g. lesson creation) without including CSRF token
Verify request is rejected with CSRF token mismatch error
Submit the same form with correct CSRF token
Verify submission succeeds

title: System handles expired sessions gracefully
description: Verify that when a user's session expires, any subsequent request redirects to login page with an informative message.

steps.description: Login as admin
Manually expire session or wait for expiration
Attempt to access any protected page
Verify user is redirected to login page with session expiration message

title: System prevents unauthorized access to APIs
description: Test that RESTful API endpoints for lessons, users, roles, permissions, and school classes reject requests without proper authentication and authorization.

steps.description: Send API requests without authentication tokens
Verify API returns authentication error
Send API requests with authentication but lacking required roles/permissions
Verify API returns authorization error
